extension.description: The ultimate productivity tool to automatically manage SideBar and Panel visibility.
config.title: Auto Hide Ultimate
config.autoHideRightSideBar: Hide the right SideBar when the user clicks into a text editor.
config.autoHideLeftSideBar: Hide the left SideBar when the user clicks into a text editor.
config.autoHidePanel: Hide the Panel (output, terminal, etc.) when the user clicks into a text editor.
config.autoHideReferences: Hide the References panel (`Go to References`) when the user clicks into a text editor.
config.hideOnOpen: Hide SideBars and Panel when VSCode first opens.
config.hideRightSideBarWhenDebug: Hide right SideBar when the user clicks into a text editor in debug mode.
config.hideLeftSideBarWhenDebug: Hide left SideBar when the user clicks into a text editor in debug mode.
config.hidePanelWhenDebug: Hide Panel when the user clicks into a text editor in debug mode.
config.autoShowRightSideBar: Show the right SideBar when the user clicks into a text editor.
config.autoShowLeftSideBar: Show the left SideBar when the user clicks into a text editor.
config.autoShowPanel: Show the Panel (output, terminal, etc.) when the user clicks into a text editor.
config.showRightSideBarWhenDebug: Show right SideBar when the user clicks into a text editor in debug mode.
config.showLeftSideBarWhenDebug: Show left SideBar when the user clicks into a text editor in debug mode.
config.showPanelWhenDebug: Show Panel when the user clicks into a text editor in debug mode.
config.hideRightSideBarOnDebug: Hide right SideBar when the user enters debug mode.
config.hideLeftSideBarOnDebug: Hide left SideBar when the user enters debug mode.
config.hidePanelOnDebug: Hide Panel when the user enters debug mode.
config.showRightSideBarOnDebug: Show right SideBar when the user enters debug mode.
config.showLeftSideBarOnDebug: Show left SideBar when the user enters debug mode.
config.showPanelOnDebug: Show Panel when the user enters debug mode.
config.hideRightSideBarOnDebugEnd: Hide right SideBar when the user exits debug mode.
config.hideLeftSideBarOnDebugEnd: Hide left SideBar when the user exits debug mode.
config.hidePanelOnDebugEnd: Hide Panel when the user exits debug mode.
config.showRightSideBarOnDebugEnd: Show right SideBar when the user exits debug mode.
config.showLeftSideBarOnDebugEnd: Show left SideBar when the user exits debug mode.
config.showPanelOnDebugEnd: Show Panel when the user exits debug mode.
command.toggleAutoHideRightSideBar: Toggle AutoHide Right SideBar for Current Workspace
command.toggleAutoHideLeftSideBar: Toggle AutoHide Left SideBar for Current Workspace
command.toggleAutoHidePanel: Toggle AutoHide Panel for Current Workspace
command.toggleAutoHideReferences: Toggle AutoHide References for Current Workspace
command.toggleHideOnOpen: Toggle AutoHide SideBars and Panel when VSCode first opens
command.toggleHideLeftSideBarWhenDebug: Toggle AutoHide left SideBar when debug mode for Current Workspace
command.toggleHideRightSideBarWhenDebug: Toggle AutoHide right SideBar when debug mode for Current Workspace
command.toggleHidePanelWhenDebug: Toggle AutoHide Panel when debug mode for Current Workspace
command.toggleAutoShowRightSideBar: Toggle AutoShow right SideBar for Current Workspace
command.toggleAutoShowLeftSideBar: Toggle AutoShow left SideBar for Current Workspace
command.toggleAutoShowPanel: Toggle AutoShow Panel for Current Workspace
command.toggleShowRightSideBarWhenDebug: Toggle show right SideBar when debug mode for Current Workspace
command.toggleShowLeftSideBarWhenDebug: Toggle show left SideBar when debug mode for Current Workspace
command.toggleShowPanelWhenDebug: Toggle show Panel when debug mode for Current Workspace
command.toggleHideRightSideBarOnDebug: Toggle autohide right SideBar in debug mode for Current Workspace
command.toggleHideLeftSideBarOnDebug: Toggle autohide left SideBar in debug mode for Current Workspace
command.toggleHidePanelOnDebug: Toggle autohide Panel in debug mode for Current Workspace
command.toggleShowRightSideBarOnDebug: Toggle autoshow right SideBar in debug mode for Current Workspace
command.toggleShowLeftSideBarOnDebug: Toggle autoshow left SideBar in debug mode for Current Workspace
command.toggleShowPanelOnDebug: Toggle autoshow Panel in debug mode for Current Workspace
command.toggleHideRightSideBarOnDebugEnd: Toggle autohide right SideBar in exit debug mode for Current Workspace
command.toggleHideLeftSideBarOnDebugEnd: Toggle autohide left SideBar in exit debug mode for Current Workspace
command.toggleHidePanelOnDebugEnd: Toggle autohide Panel in exit debug mode for Current Workspace
command.toggleShowRightSideBarOnDebugEnd: Toggle autoshow right SideBar in exit debug mode for Current Workspace
command.toggleShowLeftSideBarOnDebugEnd: Toggle autoshow left SideBar in exit debug mode for Current Workspace
command.toggleShowPanelOnDebugEnd: Toggle autoshow Panel in exit debug mode for Current Workspace
config.enabled: Global switch to enable or disable all Auto Hide Plus features.
config.hideDelay: Delay in milliseconds before hiding the SideBar or Panel.
config.excludeLanguages: List of language IDs (e.g., 'markdown', 'json') that should NOT trigger auto-hide.
config.hideOnFocusLost: Automatically hide SideBar and Panel when VS Code loses focus.
config.autoHideIdleTimeout: Hide SideBar and Panel after X seconds of inactivity (0 to disable).
command.toggleEnabled: Toggle Auto Hide Plus Global Switch
